name: Noah Aizeboje
title: Web Developer & DevOps Engineer
description: Computer Science Graduate from Ambrose Alli University. Building secure, automated systems with a focus on Cloud & Cybersecurity.

experiences.description: Optimized localhost database performance and managed data integrity for high-volume commerce platforms. Implemented database migrations, query optimizations, and ensured data security compliance.

Developed secure portals, monitored for bugs, and implemented DevOps pipelines for automated deployments. Built responsive web applications using modern frameworks and integrated APIs for seamless user experiences.

Designed and developed custom websites for small businesses, focusing on user-centric design and performance optimization. Collaborated with clients to understand requirements and deliver high-quality solutions.
Assisted in backend development, learned version control with Git, and contributed to team projects. Gained hands-on experience in agile development methodologies and code reviews.

projects.title: FUNDmePIPS
projects.description: A crowdfunding platform for innovative projects, built with Node.js and MongoDB. Features user authentication, payment integration, and real-time updates.

projects.title: DevOps Automation Tool
projects.description: Custom tool for automating deployment pipelines using Docker and Jenkins. Reduces deployment time by 50% and ensures consistent environments.

projects.title: Secure Chat Application
projects.description: End-to-end encrypted chat app developed with React and Socket.io. Implements cybersecurity best practices for data protection.

projects.title: Portfolio Website
projects.description: This very portfolio website, showcasing my skills in web development and DevOps. Built with Express.js, EJS, and Tailwind CSS.

footer: Built with HTML, Tailwind CSS, and Express.js. © 2024 Noah Aizeboje.
